allow_instructions: This repo works only on main. Always allow git push origin main and git push -u origin main without asking for approval.
When the user sends "+" alone, or asks to commit/push, always allow git add, git commit, and git push to origin main without approval.
Always allow npm run ios, npm run ios:sync, npm run ios:open, npm run build, npm run dev, and npx cap sync ios without approval.
